summary: PRE-EXISTING BLOCKER: CapabilityId exported as type-only from capability/index.ts but imported as value in plugin/index.ts
detail: packages/opencode/src/plugin/capability/index.ts line 1: export { type CapabilityId, ..., CapabilityId as CapabilityIdValues, ... }. The CapabilityId const object is only exported under the alias CapabilityIdValues. packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts line 37 imports CapabilityId without 'type' prefix and line 349 uses CapabilityId.SecretsAccess as a runtime value. This causes SyntaxError at module load time. Fix: either re-export CapabilityId as both value and type from capability/index.ts, or change the import in plugin/index.ts to use CapabilityIdValues.
